title: Format SQL queries to prevent SQL injection
description: This rule checks if SQL queries are properly formatted to prevent SQL injection.
message: SQL query is not properly formatted.
recommendation: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements.

noncompliant.code: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = ' + username)
noncompliant.description: Direct user input in SQL query.

compliant.description: Parameterized query with user input as a parameter.

why_is_this_an_issue: Direct user input in SQL queries can lead to SQL injection attacks.
how_to_fix: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements.
